title: Momu
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The "'''Momu'''" was a ritualistic learning session in which [[Yrashu]] tutors would take their young ones into the jungle an teach them the way of Yrashu jungle survival. The session culminated with the creation of a [[Yrashu mace]] made from the roots of a [[hmumfmumf tree]], and was said to "take as long as it takes". A Momu presupposed membership of the tribe, so any non-member had to go through a ritual of being adopted as part of the tribe.

Prior to the [[Battle of Baskarn]], a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] was adopted into a Yrashu tribe and taught jungle survival the Yrashu way. During their Momu, they encountered a [[hrosma tiger]]. The acquired skills would prove essential in the defeat of the Empire during the battle.

==Appearances==
